title: Caralluma winkleriana
taxonomy: Caralluma winkleriana is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to India and is a type of cactus. The plant is a succulent, which means it has adapted to store water in its leaves or stems. This adaptation helps it to survive in arid environments. Caralluma winkleriana is a member of the genus Caralluma, which is a group of flowering plants that are commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions.
